message: Path is not inside a Dandiset

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: HEDVersion
issueMessage: Field description: If HED tags are used:
The version of the HED schema used to validate HED tags for study.
May include a single schema or a base schema and one or more library schema.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: GeneratedBy
issueMessage: Field description: Used to specify provenance of the dataset.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SourceDatasets
issueMessage: Field description: Used to specify the locations and relevant attributes of all source datasets (BIDS or not).
Valid keys in each object include `"URL"`, `"DOI"` (see
[URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)), and
`"Version"` with
[string](https://www.w3schools.com/js/js_json_datatypes.asp)
values.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FiducialsCoordinates
issueMessage: Field description: Key-value pairs of the labels and 3-D digitized position of anatomical
landmarks, interpreted following the `"FiducialsCoordinateSystem"`
(for example, `{"NAS": [12.7,21.3,13.9], "LPA": [5.2,11.3,9.6],
"RPA": [20.2,11.3,9.1]}`).
Each array MUST contain three numeric values corresponding to x, y, and z
axis of the coordinate system in that exact order.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FiducialsCoordinateSystem
issueMessage: Field description: Defines the coordinate system for the fiducials.
Preferably the same as the `"EEGCoordinateSystem"`.
See the
[Coordinate Systems Appendix](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/coordinate-systems.md)
for a list of restricted keywords for coordinate systems.
If `"Other"`, provide definition of the coordinate system in
`"FiducialsCoordinateSystemDescription"`.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FiducialsCoordinateUnits
issueMessage: Field description: Units in which the coordinates that are  listed in the field
`"FiducialsCoordinateSystem"` are represented.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FiducialsCoordinateSystemDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Free-form text description of the coordinate system.
May also include a link to a documentation page or paper describing the
system in greater detail.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinates
issueMessage: Field description: Key-value pairs of the labels and 3-D digitized locations of anatomical landmarks,
interpreted following the `"AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystem"`
(for example, `{"NAS": [12.7,21.3,13.9], "LPA": [5.2,11.3,9.6],
"RPA": [20.2,11.3,9.1]}`.
Each array MUST contain three numeric values corresponding to x, y, and z
axis of the coordinate system in that exact order.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystem
issueMessage: Field description: Defines the coordinate system for the anatomical landmarks.
See the [Coordinate Systems Appendix](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/coordinate-systems.md)
for a list of restricted keywords for coordinate systems.
If `"Other"`, provide definition of the coordinate system in
`"AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystemDescription"`.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateUnits
issueMessage: Field description: Units of the coordinates of `"AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystem"`.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystemDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Free-form text description of the coordinate system.
May also include a link to a documentation page or paper describing the
system in greater detail.
Empty files not allowed.

with type EOG in the associated channels.tsv file.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DeviceSerialNumber
issueMessage: Field description: The serial number of the equipment that produced the measurements.
A pseudonym can also be used to prevent the equipment from being
identifiable, so long as each pseudonym is unique within the dataset.

(for example, `"placed on right mastoid (M2)"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: HeadCircumference
issueMessage: Field description: Circumference of the participant's head, expressed in cm (for example, `58`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SubjectArtefactDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Freeform description of the observed subject artifact and its possible cause
(for example, `"Vagus Nerve Stimulator"`, `"non-removable implant"`).
If this field is set to `"n/a"`, it will be interpreted as absence of major
source of artifacts except cardiac and blinks.

issueMessage: Field description: Object containing key-value pairs related to the software used to present
the stimuli during the experiment.

Preferably the same as the `"EEGCoordinateSystem"`.
See the
[Coordinate Systems Appendix](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/coordinate-systems.md)
for a list of restricted keywords for coordinate systems.
If `"Other"`, provide definition of the coordinate system in
`"FiducialsCoordinateSystemDescription"`.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FiducialsCoordinateUnits
issueMessage: Field description: Units in which the coordinates that are  listed in the field
`"FiducialsCoordinateSystem"` are represented.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: FiducialsCoordinateSystemDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Free-form text description of the coordinate system.
May also include a link to a documentation page or paper describing the
system in greater detail.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinates
issueMessage: Field description: Key-value pairs of the labels and 3-D digitized locations of anatomical landmarks,
interpreted following the `"AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystem"`
(for example, `{"NAS": [12.7,21.3,13.9], "LPA": [5.2,11.3,9.6],
"RPA": [20.2,11.3,9.1]}`.
Each array MUST contain three numeric values corresponding to x, y, and z
axis of the coordinate system in that exact order.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystem
issueMessage: Field description: Defines the coordinate system for the anatomical landmarks.
See the [Coordinate Systems Appendix](SPEC_ROOT/appendices/coordinate-systems.md)
for a list of restricted keywords for coordinate systems.
If `"Other"`, provide definition of the coordinate system in
`"AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystemDescription"`.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateUnits
issueMessage: Field description: Units of the coordinates of `"AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystem"`.

A JSON file is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: AnatomicalLandmarkCoordinateSystemDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Free-form text description of the coordinate system.
May also include a link to a documentation page or paper describing the
system in greater detail.
Empty files not allowed.

The EOGChannelCount metadata does not match the number of channels
with type EOG in the associated channels.tsv file.

The MiscChannelCount metadata does not match the number of channels
with type MISC in the associated channels.tsv file.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: DeviceSerialNumber
issueMessage: Field description: The serial number of the equipment that produced the measurements.
A pseudonym can also be used to prevent the equipment from being
identifiable, so long as each pseudonym is unique within the dataset.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: Instructions
issueMessage: Field description: Text of the instructions given to participants before the recording.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: CogAtlasID
issueMessage: Field description: [URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)
of the corresponding [Cognitive Atlas](https://www.cognitiveatlas.org/)
Task term.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: CogPOID
issueMessage: Field description: [URI](SPEC_ROOT/common-principles.md#uniform-resource-indicator)
of the corresponding [CogPO](http://www.cogpo.org/) term.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: InstitutionalDepartmentName
issueMessage: Field description: The department in the institution in charge of the equipment that produced
the measurements.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: MISCChannelCount
issueMessage: Field description: Number of miscellaneous channels not covered otherwise.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: EEGGround
issueMessage: Field description: Description of the location of the ground electrode
(for example, `"placed on right mastoid (M2)"`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: HeadCircumference
issueMessage: Field description: Circumference of the participant's head, expressed in cm (for example, `58`).

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: SubjectArtefactDescription
issueMessage: Field description: Freeform description of the observed subject artifact and its possible cause
(for example, `"Vagus Nerve Stimulator"`, `"non-removable implant"`).
If this field is set to `"n/a"`, it will be interpreted as absence of major
source of artifacts except cardiac and blinks.

A data file's JSON sidecar is missing a key listed as recommended.
subCode: StimulusPresentation
issueMessage: Field description: Object containing key-value pairs related to the software used to present
the stimuli during the experiment.

A TSV file has extra columns which are not defined in its associated JSON sidecar
